reviews.review_description: Has smooth everything good engine just needs better graphics Yk
So good best basketball game ever

I haven’t played it yet, but the people who are hating are gay as hell I would never play Barbies over this game. I would probably bang my head into a wall instead of playing Barbies.
￼
Devs keep updating its rlly fun

It was really fun. They added smooth locomotion finally! I can play it. The game is pretty good. Not many bugs or anything, but not the most entertaining quite yet. Also, currently, you cannot view your inventory or health or anything. Besides that though, this game, which seems more like a tech demo, has a pretty good start, and I am excited to see what comes of it! 

P.S. Do you guys have like a discord or something. If not, I think one could help out a lot. If you get the server up, maybe put the link here, on sidequest, or on your website.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Much appreciated!

reviews.review_description: Bro this get is so boring like it's the worst get ever I would rather play Barbie's
